## Checklist

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#what-a-finished-pr-looks-like) for details.

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format && uv run ruff check` clean
- [ ] Docs updated (README, `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/*.md`) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible
